annotations.request_text: rectangle around the Toolkit Settings heading labeled 'Toolkit Settings'
annotations.target_description: Page heading text Toolkit Settings near the top of the content area
annotations.notes: Corrected from the tab bar to the visible page heading area.

annotations.request_text: rectangle around the enable or configuration controls labeled 'Toolkit Controls'
